title: Double Exposure Text Mask Poster AI
sourceTitle: Double Exposure Text Mask Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Bold lavender double-exposure text-mask poster built around HOPE, young woman with soft black curls, clear hazel eyes, light freckles, and a serene calm expression, and warm lavender glow with soft-focus moon flowers and tiny violet petals inside the letters. Subject: young woman with soft black curls, clear hazel eyes, light freckles, and a serene calm expression fills the interior of the large HOPE letterforms, with the face, eyes, hair, and expression readable through the text mask. Scene: warm lavender glow with soft-focus moon flowers and tiny violet petals inside the letters appears behind the portrait inside the letters while the outside field stays a clean solid lavender-purple background. Composition: Fixed minimalist square graphic: one centered all-caps word dominates the canvas, each letter acts as a portrait mask, subtle 3D drop shadow separates the typography from the flat background, and generous negative space keeps the word readable. Signature Elements: The portrait, floral glow, and soft-focus inner imagery remain clipped inside the letter shapes, creating the source double-exposure mechanism. Style: Digital double-exposure text-masking graphic with bold sans-serif capital typography, detailed portrait realism inside the letters, soft floral depth, clean poster finish, and polished social graphic clarity. Color Palette: Fixed lavender, purple, violet, warm mauve glow, soft skin tones, dark hair accents, and high-contrast letter-mask depth. Lighting: Warm calm glow inside the typography with soft portrait highlights, gentle floral haze, and enough contrast to keep every letter legible. Typography: Render HOPE as the only huge readable word, using bold all-capital sans-serif letters with crisp edges and subtle drop shadow. Restrictions: Keep the word readable, keep one coherent portrait inside the letters, preserve the lavender minimalist background, maintain crisp typography edges, and use intentional text only.

promptTranslations.zh:
